Who We Are

We're Liam and Jacob — a father-and-son team based in Alfreton, Derbyshire. With years of hands-on experience in plumbing, heating, and bathroom installations, we've built our reputation on reliability, transparency, and quality workmanship.

From emergency call-outs at midnight to full bathroom renovations, we treat every job as if it were our own home. No hidden charges, no call-out fees — just honest, professional service from people you can trust.

We're fully Gas Safe registered and carry full public liability insurance, so you're covered every step of the way.
